LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARY FRANUS MOTION FOR AWARD OF MANDATORY ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS. TIMOTHY STEARNS, COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT ATTEMPTED TO MAKE HIS APPEARANCE BY COURTCALL, BUT DUE TO TECHNICAL DIFFICULTIES WAS UNABLE TO APPEAR. MR. TIMOTHY STEARNS CONTACED DEPARTMENT 302 AFTER THE LAW AND MOTION HEARINGS PROCEEDINGS WERE COMPLETED AND EXPLAINED HIS DIFFICULTIES IN MAKING HIS APPEARANE IN TODAYS MATTER. THE COURT HAS AGREED TO CONTINUE THIS MATTER TO A DATE THAT IS AGREED TO BY ALL PARTIES. HEARING RESET FOR THURSDAY FEBRUARY 14, 2019 AT 9:30 A.M. IN LAW & MOTION, BY MR. STEARN WITH AN AGREEMENT OF ALL PARTIES TO CONTINUE THIS MATTER TO FEBRUARY 14, 2019. MOTION PAPERS FOR TODAY HAVE BEEN MOVED TO FEBRUARY 14, 2019. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED.
